options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <instName> # name of instance to pad (string, required) <padding> # amount of padding to add, in number of sites

options.name: -bottom
options.description: amount of pading at the bottom, in number of rows

options.name: -left
options.description: amount of padding on the left side, in number of sites

options.name: -right
options.description: amount of padding on the right side, in number of sites

options.name: -top
options.description: amount of padding on the top, in number of rows
